name: web_data_capture
description: Proficiency in fetching, rendering, and capturing data from web pages using programmatic browser automation
instructions_md: To capture web data: 1) Identify the target URL and data type needed (text, table, or screenshot). 2) Use web_screenshot for visual captures or financial charts where exact pixel representation matters. 3) Use web_extract_text with a CSS selector for structured text extraction. 4) Use web_extract_table when the data is in an HTML table format — check table_index if multiple tables exist. 5) Verify the captured content is complete and matches the expected data before storing or using it downstream.
